content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Can't Collaborate
content.seo_description: Learn how to build user onboarding to overcome collaboration friction. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Collaboration fails when users don't understand your app's workflow. By implementing a guided user onboarding flow, you bridge the gap between registration and value. This tutorial teaches you to build an interactive, step-by-step walkthrough that turns confused visitors into active collaborators using modern AI development tools.
content.intro:
You’ve deployed your first SaaS, but the analytics are a graveyard. Users land, click once, and vanish. The truth? Your app isn't broken—it's just a stranger in a crowded room. Without a clear path to collaboration, your users feel isolated, leading to immediate churn. The barrier isn't your code; it's the invisible wall between 'login' and 'aha!' moment.

Today, we shatter that wall. We are going to engineer a seamless onboarding experience that converts casual visitors into power users. Using the precision of Antigravity and the speed of Claude Code, you will transform your project from a static tool into a collaborative workspace that guides, educates, and retains.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before coding, map out the exact three clicks a user needs to make to perform their first collaborative action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead UX Engineer. Create a 3-step user journey map for a collaborative task management app, focusing on minimizing friction for first-time users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a JSON structure defining the onboarding steps for a collaborative workspace.'

steps.title: Build the Onboarding Component
steps.description: Create a reusable UI component that overlays the dashboard to highlight key collaboration features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, responsive React onboarding tooltip component that highlights a specific DOM element using standard CSS positioning.

steps.title: Implement State Persistence
steps.description: Ensure the app remembers where the user left off if they refresh their browser during the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom React hook using localStorage to track which onboarding steps the user has completed.

steps.title: Integrate Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Attach your component to the 'Invite Team Member' button to drive immediate engagement.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an integration script that triggers the onboarding overlay specifically when the 'Invite' button is rendered in the DOM.

steps.title: Validate and Refine
steps.description: Test the flow for edge cases to ensure the UI remains intuitive even on mobile devices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite for the onboarding flow using Vitest, covering user completion and early exit scenarios.

pro_tips: Never force a tour longer than 4 steps; if it takes longer, your UI is too complex and needs a redesign.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure'—only show the next button once the user has actually interacted with the feature.
Add a 'Skip' button. Forcing a tour creates immediate resentment among power users.
Measure 'Completion Rate' as a primary KPI; if users drop off at step 2, rewrite the copy for that specific tooltip.
Always include a 'Help' icon that allows the user to re-trigger the tour at any time.
resources: UX Collective - Onboarding Best Practices: https://uxdesign.cc
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, deploy your app to Vercel and share the link in our community showcase to get real user feedback.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark. Your potential users are waiting for a better experience, and you now have the tools to deliver it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
